title: The Ethereum Fork: Creation of ETH and ETC
description: A timeline illustrating the key event that led to the split of Ethereum into two separate currencies: Ethereum (ETH) and Ethereum Classic (ETC).
relationships: The DAO Hack exploit created a major crisis, leading to a proposal for a hard fork to reverse the hack. The community split over the decision, resulting in two separate blockchains: ETH continuing from the forked chain and ETC continuing the original immutable chain.
